gist.headline: New sprout in the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app blooms in our community greenhouse! Check out vox.riko, the latest addition to our growing ecosystem of community-built tools.
gist.summary: Added the community-built app vox.riko to the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse directories.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore vox.riko alongside other community creations in the app directory.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a new app to the 'Greenhouse' (our community app directory). The visual should feature Polly the bee acting as a gardener in a literal greenhouse, tending to a new digital plant that represents the new app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing code-plant in a lush digital greenhouse. A small wooden sign next to the plant reads 'vox.riko' in pixel font. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
